name: Cats Love Cake
author: Poki
description: Cat Loves Cake is a skill game where you have to bounce your cat across the level without hitting any obstacles. Unlock more and more playable animals as you complete levels. If you fail a couple times, the level will show you the perfect route to take. Can you finish all levels and unlock all playable characters? How to play: Move - Arrow keys About the creator: Cat Loves Cake was created by DoubleDutch Games. This their second game on Poki after Pogo Penguin
